title: Blocked Nose Solutions: 9 Herbal Teas for Asthmatics
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra teas have been used for centuries to help relieve a blocked nose, and for good reason. The tea contains properties and constituents like glycyrrhizin, a saponin compound, and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory and decongestant effects. When you drink Glycyrrhiza glabra tea, the glycyrrhizin helps to break down excess mucus and reduce swelling in the nasal passages, making it easier to breathe.
